title: eriostemon nodiflorus subsp. lasiocalyx
intro: Eriostemon nodiflorus subsp. lasiocalyx, also known as the yellow jess, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriostemon nodiflorus subsp. lasiocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical remedies.
